description:
Universal Media Server is a DLNA-compliant UPnP Media Server. It is capable of sharing video, audio and images between most modern devices.


Summary
In this release we have added support for Linkplay WiiM devices, improved LG TV support, added the ability for renderers to specify support for file muxing mode, fixed bugs and improved performance!
This is likely to be one of the last v14 releases. We are really focusing on v15 but also still working with you to fix bugs in v14.
The first v15 beta release will be out very soon, and if that goes well we can progress quickly to the first real v15 release. Thanks to everyone who has tried it so far, and we would love to get more feedback on it.
Changes
General
- Added the ability for renderers to specify support for file muxing mode
- Fixed renderers forgetting user account assignments (#4834)
- Fixed AV1 codec parsing
- Fixed sending API requests with not enough data to succeed
- Performance improvements
- Many improvements and additions to automated tests
- Logging improvements
Media players
- Added support for Linkplay WiiM devices (WiiM Mini, Pro and Pro Plus) (thanks, boessu!)
- Fixed support for some AVI files on LG TVs
- Cleaned up Panasonic TV configs
Translation updates via Crowdin
- Norwegian (59%) (thanks, elislays08!)
